reviews.review_description: The app does not run at all. It only turns my screen black and I cannot do anything until I remove the devise and place it again.
A great vr experience but could be better in 3d.
Devs are a long way from making this a fun experience. To start, very limited to what you can say. Then there is this pause and character moves which doesn't feel right.
I asked many different questions, even the ones on the cards in front of me and...nothing. No response. Yes I had my microphone on and I spoke loudly and clearly.
Freezes at oculus logo since update.  Was fairly promising before, but if anything has been added, can't comment on it.  Running on an s6.
All the excitement of a Flash game, combined with the frustration of a broken joystick.

The voice recognition is so bad that I have never managed to get more than two questions in before giving up. Considering all it has to do is recognise which one of two very different phrases you are speaking, that is pretty bad. Yes I used two different sets of headphones and microphones in a quiet room.

reviews.review_title: Terrible voice recognition. To big size.
reviews.review_description:
It have a terrible voice recognition even thou it is only between 2 pre-made question you can ask each time it have difficulties to understand which of them you ask. 

It is to big size, how can it be so big even thou it is only a handful of pre-made question to ask a handful of people.  

It repeat it self, next time you meet them it Start over again with same questions, they have no memory from the last meeting.
Loads on s6 but phone broke so can't try it won't load on s8
This is what VR was made for. It feels incredibly real. Super high quality. Amazing experience!!
Crashes my phone on the Oculus splash screen. Asks for permission to make phone calls. S7 Exynos
instail faild
As others have said, it freezes at a grey Oculus logo and causes a complete crash that requires removing the phone to reset.
stuck at voice recognition page
Fall asleep...
Doesn't work.  Fix this.

reviews.review_title: Good idea but not immersive enough
reviews.review_description: Voice recognition is not that good, you have to repeat simple questions several times, maybe the app should get a hint from the card you're looking at... Also the girl is too far, it makes the low resolution distracting. And I'm not sure it has a 3d effect, feels like just a 360 video. Also I've tried 36 questions in real life and it feels way different. But keep trying, it might get more interesting. Maybe try with a 3d model to get a better flow in the interaction.

The idea, the questions are good, the answers are diverse. Not very sure about how genuine the stories are. 

The technical part... Had to shout, repeat myself 12 times and it seems the internet connection is used for voice analysis. It's a huge app to install when you will most likely use one story line. Should download the characters on demand maybe?...

developer_response.body:
Hi Denis, 

Internet is used for voice recognition. To improve voice recognition we suggest using headphones. The sounds coming from the Gear VR headset can interfere with voice recognition. It also helps to do the experience in a quiet room with no outside sounds or talking.

reviews.review_description: Now it only freezes on the Oculus screen and have to remove phone to reset. Voice recognition is awful! Have to yell to get a response. And it takes forever to be heard. Makes for an awkward convo!

Freezes once app gets to oculus logo... Please advise


has this issue been fixed ?
